# Tyent India

> Tyent is the world's No.1 alkaline water ionizer brand, offering premium hydrogen-rich alkaline water ionizer machines in India. With over 9 million users across 73+ countries and 125+ international certifications, Tyent delivers the healthiest water through advanced Japanese ionization technology.

## About Tyent

Tyent, manufactured by Medilight Co. Ltd. (South Korea), is a global leader in water ionization technology. Tyent India (tyent.co.in) is the official Indian distributor offering the complete range of Tyent water ionizers for homes, offices, and commercial establishments across India.

## Products

### Counter-Top Water Ionizers (NMP Series)
- [NMP-5](https://www.tyent.co.in/nmp-5): Entry-level ionizer with 5 solid hybrid mesh plates
- [NMP-7](https://www.tyent.co.in/nmp-7): Mid-range ionizer with 7 solid hybrid mesh plates
- [NMP-9](https://www.tyent.co.in/nmp-9): Advanced ionizer with 9 solid hybrid mesh plates
- [NMP-11](https://www.tyent.co.in/nmp-11): Premium ionizer with 11 solid hybrid mesh plates

### Under-Counter Water Ionizers (UCE Plus Series)
- [UCE-9 Plus](https://www.tyent.co.in/uce-9-plus): Under-counter ionizer with 9 plates
- [UCE-11 Plus](https://www.tyent.co.in/uce-11-plus): Under-counter ionizer with 11 plates
- [UCE-13 Plus](https://www.tyent.co.in/uce-13-plus): Flagship under-counter ionizer with 13 plates

### Other Products
- [Hybrid H2](https://www.tyent.co.in/hybrid-h2): Portable hydrogen water generator
- [Sterilizing Water Generator](https://www.tyent.co.in/Sterilizing-water-generator): Electrolyzed water for sanitization
- [Tyent Soap](https://www.tyent.co.in/soap): Alkaline soap products
- [Water Bottle](https://www.tyent.co.in/water-bottle-1): Portable alkaline water bottle
- [Replacement Filter](https://www.tyent.co.in/filter-1): 0.01-micron replacement filters

## Key Technology

- **Solid Hybrid Mesh Plates**: Patented electrode technology for maximum ionization efficiency
- **SMPS Plus Power Supply**: Patented power system for consistent performance and energy efficiency
- **0.01-Micron Dual Filtration**: Removes 99.99% of contaminants including bacteria, nano-viruses, nano-plastics, chlorine, and heavy metals
- **7 Types of Water**: Produces strong acidic (pH 2.5), acidic, slightly acidic, neutral, slightly alkaline, alkaline, and strong alkaline (pH 11.5) water

## Benefits of Tyent Water

- **Molecular Hydrogen (H2)**: Powerful selective antioxidant that neutralizes harmful free radicals
- **Alkaline pH**: Drinking water pH range of 7-9.5 helps neutralize body acidity
- **Micro-Clustered**: Smaller water molecule clusters for better cellular hydration and absorption
- **Mineral-Rich**: Retains essential alkaline minerals — calcium, magnesium, potassium, sodium
- **Ultra-Pure**: 0.01-micron filtration ensures water free from contaminants

## Certifications

Tyent holds 125+ international certifications including:
- ISO 9001, ISO 14001
- NSF/ANSI Standards
- KFDA (Korea Food & Drug Administration)
- CE Marking
- EPA Registration
- FDA Registration
